rationale.D1: Confirmed standard command-based with SubsystemBase subclasses (Intake, Flywheel, Hood, Turret, ClimberArms) owning hardware directly via CTRE/REV objects; no IO interfaces found (index shows zero), and the CTRE TunerConstants swerve generation is a vendored abstraction counted at D2, not an IO layer — score is L1.
rationale.D2: Confirmed ClimbState enum with get/setClimbState transitions in ClimberArms used by EndGameDoubleArmClimb (a real guarded state sequence), and ShotType enum in Shooter routing lookup tables; no Superstructure coordinator found, so this is between L1 (command composition) and L2 (per-subsystem state enums with transition logic) — awarded 1.5.
rationale.D3: Confirmed CTRE SwerveDrivetrain sim notifier (updateSimState via startSimThread) runs physics for the drivetrain, and PhotonVision VisionSystemSim with PhotonCameraSim wired in AprilTagVision.initializeSimulation() and called from CommandSwerveDrivetrain.periodic; however simulationPeriodic in Robot.java is an empty stub and no mechanism physics sims (ElevatorSim etc.) were found — partial credit at 1.5.
rationale.D4: Confirmed no src/test/java files exist; build.gradle lists junit dependency and configures test task (WPILib boilerplate) but no test source was written — D4=0.
rationale.D5: Confirmed custom RobotLog wrapper over WPILib DataLogManager (structured binary logging to file) used across 8+ subsystem files (Flywheel, Hood, Turret, Hopper, IntakePivot, IntakeRoller, ShooterFeeder, DataLogger, Shoot), alongside SmartDashboard.put calls; this is systematic structured logging beyond dashboard-scatter but below AdvantageKit — D5=2.
rationale.D6: Confirmed 51 PathPlanner .path files and multiple .auto files in deploy/pathplanner/, AutoBuilder.configure() wired in CommandSwerveDrivetrain, CoreAuto loads and follows paths via AutoBuilder.followPath(), and EventTrigger markers used; pathFindToPose method exists but no call sites were found in the codebase — confirmed L2 PathPlanner autos, no active on-the-fly pathfinding.
rationale.D7: Confirmed PhotonVision multi-camera pose estimation (3 cameras on comp bot) with std-dev tuning (SINGLE_TAG_BASE_STDDEV, MULTI_TAG_BASE_STDDEV scaled by distance), ambiguity rejection, multi-tag PNP strategy, and swerve.addVisionMeasurement called with timestamps; no TimeInterpolatableBuffer or dedicated RobotState world-model class — solid L2 with filtering putting it at 2.5.
rationale.D8: Confirmed 5 seasons of repos present (2022–2026) showing multi-year continuity; README is two lines ('Rebuilt2026 / LigerBots Rebuilt Robot Code') with no build instructions; .github/copilot-instructions.md exists but no CI workflows; no separate library repo found — basic continuity artifact only, D8=1.
